2604.00892.title: When Users Change Their Mind: Evaluating Interruptible Agents in Long-Horizon Web Navigation
2604.00892.paper_summary: As LLM agents transition from short, static problem solving to executing complex, long-horizon tasks in dynamic environments, the ability to handle user interruptions, such as adding requirement or revising goals, during mid-task execution is becoming a core requirement for realistic deployment. However, existing benchmarks largely assume uninterrupted agent behavior or study interruptions only in short, unconstrained language tasks. In this paper, we present the first systematic study of interruptible agents in long-horizon, environmentally grounded web navigation tasks, where actions induce persistent state changes. We formalize three realistic interruption types, including addition, revision, and retraction, and introduce InterruptBench, a benchmark derived from WebArena-Lite that synthesizes high-quality interruption scenarios under strict semantic constraints. Using a unified interruption simulation framework, we evaluate six strong LLM backbones across single- and multi-turn interruption settings, analyzing both their effectiveness in adapting to updated intents and their efficiency in recovering from mid-task changes. Our results show that handling user interruptions effectively and efficiently during long-horizon agentic tasks remains challenging for powerful large-scale LLMs. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/HenryPengZou/InterruptBench.
2604.00892.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLM）代理從短期、靜態問題解決轉向在動態環境中執行複雜的長期任務，處理用戶中斷的能力（例如在任務執行過程中添加需求或修訂目標）正成為現實部署的核心要求。然而，現有的基準測試大多假設代理行為不受中斷影響，或僅在短期、不受限制的語言任務中研究中斷。在本文中，我們提出了對於長期、環境基礎的網頁導航任務中可中斷代理的首次系統性研究，其中行動會引起持久的狀態變化。我們正式定義了三種現實的中斷類型，包括添加、修訂和撤回，並介紹了InterruptBench，這是一個源自WebArena-Lite的基準，合成了在嚴格語義約束下的高質量中斷場景。通過統一的中斷模擬框架，我們在單輪和多輪中斷設置中評估了六個強大的LLM骨幹，分析它們在適應更新意圖方面的有效性以及在從任務中期變更中恢復的效率。我們的結果顯示，在長期代理任務中有效且高效地處理用戶中斷對於強大的大型LLM仍然是一個挑戰。代碼和數據集可在 https://github.com/HenryPengZou/InterruptBench 獲得。
2604.00892.author: Henry Peng Zou et.al.
2604.00892.authors: Henry Peng Zou, Chunyu Miao, Wei-Chieh Huang, Yankai Chen, Yue Zhou, Hanrong Zhang, Yaozu Wu, Liancheng Fang, Zhengyao Gu, Zhen Zhang, Kening Zheng, Fangxin Wang, Yi Nian, Shanghao Li, Wenzhe Fan, Langzhou He, Weizhi Zhang, Xue Liu, Philip S. Yu
